title: SCNNC 2W E27 LED Vintage Edison Light Bulb Amber C35 Candle 230V Warm White 2200K, 20W Equivalent Non-Dimmable, LED Filament Candle E27 C35 Orange for Chandeliers, Pack of 2
features: ✦【Φ35x92MM】C35 E27 candle bulbs, Φ35x92MM, 220-240V. Please ensure that the bulb fits your light fixture before purchasing. Please note that this bulb is not dimmable! Not compatible with dimmers!!!
✦【90% Energy Saving】E27 C35 LED vintage candle bulb 2W is equivalent to a 20W incandescent bulb, saves up to 90% energy and lasts up to 25,000 hours, reducing the frequency of replacement.
✦【No Flicker】No flickering light bulb, protects your eyes. 330° beam angle, no dark areas. E27 base, easy to install, fits most E27 light fixtures.
✦【Warm White 2200K】ES e27 amber bulb combines modern LED technology with old-fashioned light bulbs. The highly transparent amber glass bulbs are ideal for nostalgic decorative retro lighting.

✦【Application】C35 E27 LED candle bulbs are ideal for ceiling chandeliers, salt lamps, table lamps, chandeliers, night lights, etc., and provide pleasant lighting as decorative lighting for parties, gardens, dinners, weddings, cafés, bars, etc.
✔【𝐒𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐬𝐟𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧】If you have any questions or suggestions after receiving the light bulb, please feel free to contact us. Our customer service team will respond to you within 24 hours.
